diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware, CreateHandlersInterface
+- Reads as: TypeScript interface definitions with handler overloads (x1 to x10), class Factory, factory function exports
+- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/hono-base, src/types, src/utils/types
+- Safe summary: Factory helper provides createApp, createHandlers for registering multiple handlers with combined types
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: Function implementations using Context and request pattern matching
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/request/constants, src/types, src/utils/url
+- Safe summary: Route helper functions to get matched routes, path info, and base paths from context
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSContextInit, WSContext, defineWebSocketHelper, WSReadyState
+- Reads as: TypeScript interfaces, WSContext class, helper factory function
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types, src/utils/http-status
+- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade helper for Hono with event listeners and context management
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: Cookie handling functions using parser/serializers from utils/cookie
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/cookie
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper for getting, setting, and deleting HTTP cookies with signed support
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: Client factory using hc from client module with custom fetch
+- Neighbor files: src/client, src/client/types, src/context, src/hono, src/types, src/utils/types
+- Safe summary: Testing helper creates HTTP client for testing routes with typed requests
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents, Runtime type
+- Reads as: Runtime detection functions using navigator.userAgent and global properties
+- Neighbor files: src/context
+- Safe summary: Adapter helper for runtime detection (node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, edge-light)
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createCssContext, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style
+- Reads as: CSS helper implementation with context creation and DOM object generation
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html, src/jsx/constants, src/jsx/dom/css, src/utils/html, src/helper/css/common
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper for styled-components with class name generation and style management
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: minify, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, ClassNameSlug, OnInvalidSlug
+- Reads as: CSS utility functions for parsing, minifying, and class name generation
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css
+- Safe summary: Common CSS utilities for class name hashing, style string building, and minification
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy, ProxyFetch
+- Reads as: Fetch API wrapper for proxy requests with hop-by-hop header handling
+- Neighbor files: src/http-exception, src/utils/headers
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper fetches remote URLs with automatic hop-by-hop header removal (RFC 2616/9110)
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: Route inspection and display functions using handler utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Dev helper for displaying registered routes and handler names in console
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: HTML templating with escapeToBuffer and callback resolution
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/html
+- Safe summary: HTML helper for template string rendering with auto-escaping and nested value support
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG exports via re-exports
+- Reads as: Module exports from ssg and middleware files
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg, src/helper/ssg/middleware, src/helper/ssg/plugins
+- Safe summary: SSG helper entry point exporting static site generation utilities
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, generateFilePath, isSSGContext
+- Reads as: Static site generation execution with concurrent content fetching and file saving
+- Neighbor files: src/client/utils, src/hono, src/types, src/utils/concurrent, src/utils/mime, src/helper/ssg/middleware, src/helper/ssg/plugins, src/helper/ssg/utils
+- Safe summary: Main SSG logic for fetching route content, generating files, and handling plugins/hooks
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: Path utilities and route filtering for SSG
+- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/router, src/types, src/utils/handler, src/helper/ssg
+- Safe summary: SSG utility functions for path manipulation and dynamic route detection
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSGContext, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
+- Reads as: Middleware for marking context as SSG, disabling/enabling SSG per route
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types, src/helper/ssg/utils
+- Safe summary: SSG middleware for context propagation and route-level SSG control
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
+- Reads as: Re-exports from stream, sse, and text modules
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream, src/helper/streaming/sse, src/helper/streaming/text
+- Safe summary: Streaming helper entry point for text, SSE, and generic stream responses
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi
+- Reads as: Generic streaming response with TransformStream and error handling
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/stream
+- Safe summary: Generic streaming helper using TransformStream with abort signal handling\
